experiments.description: original skill — no changes
continuous flow — all elements in one renderElements call (14% fewer pages)
skip body regions < 3 words — no effect
paragraph splitting across pages + fix eval stale images + skip last page in whitespace check
bodyFontSize 11 — larger text causes E5 fail (51.4% blank strip on page 32)
lineHeight 1.45 — tighter line spacing, fewer pages (39 vs 42), all pass
lineHeight 1.65 — looser spacing causes E5 fail (51.1% blank strip on page 32)
paragraphSpacing 8 — more paragraph spacing, all pass, worst strip 36.1%
marginLeft/Right 48 — wider text area, all pass, worst strip 38.9%
marginTop/Bottom 48 — taller text area causes E5 fail (54.3% blank strip on page 31)
headerFontSize 16 — larger headers cause E5 fail (48.9% blank strip on page 32)
firstLineIndent 24 — deeper indent, all pass, worst strip 38.9%
firstLineIndent 12 — smaller indent, all pass, worst strip 38.9%
illustrationPadding 6 — tighter illustration spacing, all pass, worst strip 40.1%
illustrationMaxWidth 0.95 — wider illustrations, all pass, worst strip 38.3%
bodyFontSize 11 + lineHeight 1.5 — larger text with tighter spacing, all pass, worst strip 33.2%
bodyFontSize 10 + lineHeight 1.6 — smaller text with loose spacing causes E5 fail (52.8% blank strip on page 31)
paragraphSpacing 4 — tighter paragraphs cause E5 fail (52.8% blank strip on page 31)
headerSpacingAbove 18 — more header breathing room, all pass, worst strip 34.3%
marginLeft/Right 60 — narrower text for readability, all pass, worst strip 31.5%
bodyFontSize 11 + paragraphSpacing 8 + lineHeight 1.5 — balanced combo, all pass, worst strip 32.9%

summary.best_single_reason: Lowest worst-strip (31.5%) while maintaining 18/18 — narrower text improves readability and whitespace distribution
summary.best_combo_reason: Larger font + more paragraph spacing + slightly tighter line height — best balance of readability and density (32.9% worst strip)
